lineage_note: True multi-parent synthesis. single-page-loop-02 is the primary structural template; resumable-wizard-loop-02 contributes selective safety and progress patterns; task-cards-loop-01 contributes independently understandable per-section completion state. No parent Artifact was mutated; a fresh synthesis candidate was authored.
hypothesis: Test single-page A as the structure while adopting resumable-wizard B's progress and destructive-action safety patterns and task-cards C's independently understandable completion state, so the panel's A-vs-B split (accessibility judge preferred B; human-use judge preferred A) is resolved by synthesis rather than averaged away.
outcome: The single terminal frozen objective run (PID 53728) exited 0 with all seven blocking gates passing, no failed gate IDs, no blocking failure, zero external requests, and no repair attempt. The A-structural / B-safety / C-completion-state synthesis was realized in a fresh one-page candidate. Independent qualitative synthesis judging remains pending; no qualitative scores were authored and no Champion or new_best claim is made.

human_use.rationale: The Artifact is a human-operated mobile checkout. Its success depends on discoverability, navigation, input burden, error recovery, feedback, accessibility, touch ergonomics, interruption recovery, perceived latency, destructive-action safety, and cognitive load across cross-disability use.

qualitative_evaluation.note: Qualitative use-friction is not an objective ergonomics gate. The objective harness covers only frozen technical correctness and compatibility. Independent qualitative judging of this synthesis Loop is pending; no synthesizer-authored qualitative score was recorded and none may be invented.

objective_result.metrics_treatment: Non-gating task-efficiency context only; counts neither pass nor fail a gate and do not override pending qualitative evidence.
objective_result.objective_command_provenance: Copied verbatim from synthesis/loop-01/process.json objective_runs[0].command. This command is terminal and was NOT rerun during recovery; process.json, evidence/objective-report.json, and evidence/objective-report.txt are the immutable record of the single completed run.

no_regression_check.statement: The synthesis passes all seven blocking gates using the same canonical fixture SHA-256 as every parent finalist, so there is no pass-to-fail regression against any parent. Each parent finalist objective report also records failed_gate_ids: [] and zero external requests.

adopt: one-page anchor navigation and direct Edit controls
section-grouped error summary with preserved-values reassurance
compact-completed progressive disclosure with hidden descendants excluded from focus
fictional-value hints and atomic single-placement status
reject: absence of a discoverable confirmed clear-progress control (remedied by adopting B)
literal fictional card-number hints outside a synthetic demonstration (retained only within this canonical synthetic demonstration)

adopt: step-local focused validation compatible with one page
reject: shipping choices nested inside the order-summary aside
extra step transitions that do not reduce cognitive load

task-cards-loop-01.role: independent task-status contributor retained after Loop 02 regression
reject: weak landmarks and fragile completion state

preserved_dissent.accessibility_judge_preference: candidate-b (resumable wizard): explicit save/restore, step-local validation, and a confirmed clear-progress control.
preserved_dissent.human_use_judge_preference: candidate-a (single-page): stronger landmarks, lower input burden, section-grouped recovery, and direct one-page editing.
preserved_dissent.resolution: A is the structural template while B's save/progress/clear-safety and C's completion-state are selectively adopted where compatible with one page. The dissent is preserved, not averaged.

synthesis_input_constraints: Create a fresh synthesis candidate; do not mutate a parent.
Keep all seven frozen objective gates blocking and use the unchanged harness.
Use true multi-parent lineage exactly as listed.
Write an explicit adoption/rejection matrix with evidence references.
Preserve the permanent path-remediation procedural caveat.
prompt.input_feedback: Bound the Loop 02 aggregate synthesis input (judging/loop-02/aggregate/synthesis-input.json) with parent_ids single-page-loop-02, resumable-wizard-loop-02, task-cards-loop-01, and the per-parent adopt/reject direction realized in the adoption/rejection matrix.
prompt.panel_dissent_used: Preserved the A-vs-B panel split from judging/loop-02/aggregate/dissent.md and pairwise-aggregate.json: the accessibility judge preferred candidate-b; the human-use judge preferred candidate-a. Resolved by synthesis (A structure + B safety/progress + C completion-state) rather than by averaging.
prompt.judge_feedback: Independent Loop 02 panel comparison evidence was consumed to direct adoption/rejection. No synthesis-Loop judge was run; independent qualitative judging of this synthesis is pending.
prompt.next_prompt: Authorize synthesis-loop-02 only after independent identity-blind qualitative judges operate this synthesis Loop against all eleven frozen human-use lenses and preserve dissent. If judged, apply exactly one evidence-backed refinement (candidate hypothesis below) while preserving the one-page landmarked synthesis paradigm and every frozen invariant.
prompt.next_synthesis_hypothesis: Given adopted B step-local validation now coexisting with A's grouped submit-time summary, a single evidence-backed synthesis-loop-02 refinement should reduce the residual cognitive load of a full one-page form on the smallest (320px) viewport by strengthening the compact-completed disclosure default and progress-anchored resume, without introducing wizard steps or making collapsed content keyboard-focusable, and while keeping all seven gates blocking and the harness unchanged.

changed_files_note: The functional Artifact and evidence files (index.html, styles.css, app.js, process.json, evidence/**, and both adoption/rejection matrices) were authored and frozen before the reboot and are immutable; recovery did not modify them. The remaining records (metadata.json, synthesis-report.md, status.json, ../manifest-fragment.json, and the two recovery sidecars) are the records completed during the authorized post-reboot continuation.

lesson.trigger: The Loop 02 panel dissent was a genuine A-vs-B split (accessibility judge preferred B's recoverability; human-use judge preferred A's structure), which averaging would have destroyed.
lesson.action: Resolve dissent by structured synthesis: adopt A as the one-page structural template and selectively graft B's progress and destructive-action safety plus C's independent completion state, recording each adopt/reject decision against judge evidence rather than blending scores.
lesson.evidence: The fresh synthesis candidate passed all seven blocking gates on the first terminal objective run with zero external requests and no repair, with no pass-to-fail regression against any of the three parent finalists on the shared canonical fixture.

path_remediation_procedural_caveat.statement: A permanent procedural provenance caveat applies to this experiment's lineage. During task-cards-loop-01, fifteen diagnostic scripts were written at the repository root outside the task write scope; resumable-wizard-loop-02 later deleted them before quarantine and omitted scratch provenance. This was remediated with a permanent caveat. Forensic analysis found no environment or credential reads, no external data, no generated secrets, and no network hosts; the recovered test-gates.py was byte-identical to the frozen harness. Functional and hash validity of the affected candidate is preserved, so the caveat is procedural only and does not imply functional invalidity of any parent or of this synthesis.
path_remediation_procedural_caveat.disposition: retain; do not rerun solely for remediation

reboot_interruption_recovery_caveat.statement: This synthesis Loop's records were completed by a single owner-authorized post-reboot continuation. The original agent handle synthesis-loop-01 did not survive a PC reboot; after reboot the handle was not registered, no background agents or shell sessions survived, and the recorded objective PID 53728 was not alive. The terminal objective command had already completed before the reboot (process.json and evidence/objective-report.json prove exit 0 with all seven gates passing), and both adoption/rejection matrices were written; the interruption occurred while authoring the remaining records. The persisted status.json was stale (state=running, heartbeat 2026-07-21T09:02:38.916Z, objective_status=not_started) despite the subsequently completed objective run. The objective command was NOT rerun. All fourteen immutable functional outputs were hash-verified against synthesis/recovery/recovery-inventory.json (launch SHA-256 74d30090793837c19b3e22bec442dba26d07a0c3cbba4b1ccc40b719f071ded0) before and after writing the recovery records.
